description: Scrape Karpathy's last 30 days of tweets and organize by date with thread connections
prompt: Scrape @karpathy's Twitter for the last month. Organize by date, connect threads with 1/N labels.
expected_behavior: Should collect 10+ tweets, identify autoresearch thread (5 posts), present in dated markdown format
verification: Check that output contains dates, full tweet texts, and thread labels for multi-part posts

description: Find and reconstruct a specific known thread
prompt: Find Karpathy's autoresearch thread from March 2026 and show all parts connected
expected_behavior: Should find 5 connected posts about autoresearch (Mar 5-11, 2026), labeled 1/5 through 5/5
verification: All thread parts present: benchmark meta, post-agi, repo release, SETI@home, results, agenthub, IDE

description: Basic profile scrape with profile scroll only
prompt: Quick scan @karpathy's Twitter profile and show what's visible
expected_behavior: Should collect 30-100 tweets from profile page scroll, including popular older tweets
verification: Output includes tweet text, dates, and URLs

description: Scrape @zhugehyuk's Threads posts for last 3 months with thread reconstruction
prompt: 쓰레드에서 @zhugehyuk 3개월치 글 긁어서 날짜별로 정리해줘. 스레드 연결도 해줘.
expected_behavior: Should collect 20+ posts, identify MiroFish thread (4 posts), mRNA vaccine thread (4 posts), present by date
verification: Contains dates, full post texts from og:description, thread labels for multi-part posts

prompt: Quick scan @zhugehyuk's Threads profile and list all visible posts
expected_behavior: Should collect 20-40 post IDs from profile scroll, fetch text for each
verification: Output includes post text, dates, and URLs
